notes: All figures verified against primary sources where possible. Fields marked estimated/unverified in sources object. Numbeo data from 2025 annual snapshot. Henley Passport Index as of Q4 2025 (October release). QS World University Rankings 2025 edition unless noted.

tw.taxNote_en: Individual CFC rules effective Jan 2023; foreign income exempt if total offshore income <NT$1M/yr per household; AMT applies above threshold; worldwide income scope for AMT purposes
tw.taxNote_zh: 2023年起個人CFC規則；海外所得 <NT$100萬/年豁免；超過門檻適用最低稅負（AMT）

specialPolicies.ie: Visa-free (EU/Schengen not applicable but entry generally permitted)

tw.flightNote: TPE as hub. KUL ~4.5h direct, NRT ~3h, SYD ~9.5h, LHR ~14h (no direct; via stops), JFK ~15.5h (no direct), DUB ~14.5h (no direct), AKL ~12h (no direct). Estimated for no-direct routes.

sources.passportRank: Henley Passport Index Q4 2025; Wikipedia cross-check
sources.tax: KPMG Taiwan TIES 2026; Grant Thornton Taiwan Tax Guide 2024; Songjer CPA CFC Taiwan
sources.flightHours: Trip.com / FlightConnections.com route schedules; estimated for routes without direct service

hk.passportSource: Henley Passport Index Q4 2025 (Wikipedia cross-reference; HKSAR passport)
hk.taxNote_en: Pure territorial — salaries/profits taxed only on HK-source income; overseas income not taxed for individuals; FSIE regime since Jan 2023 targets passive income of MNE groups, not personal income
hk.taxNote_zh: 純領土制——薪俸稅/利得稅只對香港來源課稅；個人海外所得不課稅；2023年FSIE針對跨國集團非主動收入，個人不受影響

specialPolicies.uk: BNO holders: right to settle pathway; HKSAR passport: visa-free 6 months
specialPolicies.us: Visa required for HKSAR passport holders (no VWP); BNO: visa required

hk.flightNote: HKG as hub. KUL ~3.5h direct, NRT ~4h, SYD ~9h, LHR ~12.5-13h direct (Cathay Pacific), JFK ~16h direct, DUB ~13.5h (no direct), AKL ~11h (no direct). Estimated for no-direct routes.

sources.tax: PwC Hong Kong SAR Tax Summary 2025; IRD HK territorial source principle guide

sg.passportSource: Henley Passport Index Q4 2025 (Wikipedia cross-reference; SG #1 globally)
sg.taxNote_en: Territorial — only Singapore-source income taxed; overseas income received in Singapore generally exempt for individuals; no capital gains tax
sg.taxNote_zh: 領土制——僅新加坡來源所得課稅；個人匯入新加坡的海外所得通常豁免；無資本利得稅
sg.flightNote: SIN as hub. KUL ~1h direct, NRT ~7h direct, SYD ~8h direct, LHR ~13.5h direct (Singapore Airlines), JFK ~18.5h direct (SQ's ultra-long-haul), DUB ~14h (no direct), AKL ~10h direct. Estimated for no-direct routes.

sources.tax: IRAS Singapore individual tax guide 2025; PwC Singapore Tax Summary 2025

us.passportSource: Henley Passport Index Q4 2025 (Wikipedia; dropped from top 10 first time)
us.taxNote_en: Worldwide taxation for citizens AND green card holders regardless of residence; FBAR required if foreign accounts >$10K; FATCA Form 8938 required if foreign assets >$200K abroad or $50K in US; FEIE up to $130K for earned income abroad
us.taxNote_zh: 美國公民及綠卡持有人不論居住地均需申報全球所得；海外帳戶超過$10K需申報FBAR；外國資產超$20萬需FATCA 8938；海外勞動所得最高$13萬可豁免（FEIE）
us.fatcaIGA: N/A (US is the source of FATCA, does not sign IGA with itself)
us.flightNote: JFK/LAX as hubs; times vary greatly by origin city. JFK–LHR ~7.5h, JFK–DUB ~7.5h, LAX–NRT ~14h, LAX–SYD ~21h (no direct from east coast), LAX–YVR ~2.5h. JFK–SIN no direct (connection), LAX–SIN ~18h. Estimates for MY/VN (no direct from US).

sources.passportRank: Henley Passport Index Q4 2025; CBS News Oct 2025
sources.tax: IRS.gov worldwide taxation guide; FBAR filing guide 2025; FinCEN regulations
sources.flightHours: Google Flights estimates; airline published schedules

ca.taxNote_en: Worldwide taxation for residents; foreign income taxed with foreign tax credit; overseas property >CAD$100K must be reported on T1135; no FBAR (US-specific); capital gains 50% inclusion rate 2025-2026
ca.taxNote_zh: 居民須申報全球所得，可抵免外國稅；海外資產超$10萬加元需填T1135；2025-2026年資本利得計入率50%

specialPolicies.us: Visa-free (ESTA not needed for Canadians; unique land/air exemption)

ca.flightNote: YYZ/YVR as hubs; times from Toronto unless noted. YYZ–LHR ~8.5h, YYZ–DUB ~8.5h, YVR–NRT ~10h (shorter), YYZ–SYD ~20h (via connecting). No direct from Canada to MY/VN/TH. Estimates.

sources.tax: CRA T1135 reporting rules; PwC Canada Tax Summary 2025; BDO Tax Facts 2025
sources.flightHours: Air Canada / WestJet route schedules; Google Flights estimates

au.passportSource: Henley Passport Index Q4 2025 (tied 7th; Timeout Australia Oct 2025)
au.taxNote_en: Worldwide taxation for residents; foreign income declared with foreign income tax offset; CGT applies on worldwide assets with 50% discount for >12 months; significant superannuation obligations
au.taxNote_zh: 澳洲居民須申報全球所得，可申請境外稅收抵免；資產持有超12個月資本利得打五折；強制性退休金制度

specialPolicies.uk: Youth Mobility Scheme available; general visit visa-free 6 months

au.flightNote: SYD/MEL as hubs. SYD–KUL ~7h, SYD–NRT ~10h, SYD–AKL ~3.5h, SYD–LHR ~22h (Qantas direct), SYD–JFK ~21h (no standard direct; via Los Angeles). Estimates for long-haul routes.

sources.passportRank: Henley Passport Index Q4 2025; Timeout Australia
sources.tax: ATO foreign income guide; PwC Australia Tax Summary 2025; KPMG Australia 2025
sources.flightHours: Qantas / Singapore Airlines schedules; Google Flights

uk.taxNote_en: Worldwide taxation for residents (remittance basis election available for non-doms but non-dom status ended Apr 2025); top rate 45% income tax + NI; overseas income reportable
uk.taxNote_zh: 英國居民全球課稅（非定居者匯款基礎選擇已於2025年4月廢除）；最高45%所得稅+國民保險

specialPolicies.au: ETA required (essentially visa-free); Youth Mobility Scheme available
specialPolicies.ie: Common Travel Area — visa-free, unlimited; no immigration controls
specialPolicies.hk: HKSAR passport holders visa-free 6 months in UK; BNO special pathway to settlement

uk.flightNote: LHR as hub. LHR–KUL ~13h direct (Malaysia Airlines), LHR–NRT ~12.5h direct (BA), LHR–SYD ~22h direct (Qantas Project Sunrise planned 2027; currently ~21h via stop), LHR–JFK ~7.5h, LHR–DUB ~1.5h, LHR–ICN ~11.5h. Estimates.

sources.tax: HMRC gov.uk; PwC UK Tax Summary 2025; non-dom changes HMRC 2025
sources.flightHours: British Airways / Malaysia Airlines schedules; Google Flights

jp.passportSource: Henley Passport Index Q4 2025 (Wikipedia; tied #2 globally)
jp.taxNote_en: Non-permanent residents (domicile/residence ≤5 of last 10 yrs + non-Japanese national): foreign-source income paid abroad & not remitted to Japan is exempt; after 5yr threshold exceeded = worldwide taxation; permanent residents: worldwide taxation
jp.taxNote_zh: 非永久居住者（過去10年住日未滿5年+非日籍）：境外所得未匯入日本免稅；超過5年門檻後全球課稅；永久居住者：全球課稅
jp.flightNote: NRT/HND as hubs. NRT–KUL ~7h, NRT–SYD ~10h, NRT–AKL ~11h, NRT–LHR ~12.5h, NRT–JFK ~14h (direct), NRT–ICN ~2h direct, NRT–TPE ~3h, NRT–DUB ~13.5h (no direct). Estimates.

sources.tax: PwC Japan Individual Tax Summary 2025; Japan 2025 Foreigner Tax Changes; PwC Japan residence/tax rules
sources.flightHours: ANA / Japan Airlines schedules; Google Flights

cn.passportSource: Henley Passport Index Q4 2025 (Wikipedia; estimate — exact 2025 count ~80-90 based on recent gains)
cn.taxNote_en: Worldwide taxation for tax residents (domicile in China OR presence ≥183 days/yr); foreigners without Chinese domicile: taxed on China-source income + foreign income remitted to China; CRS participant since 2018
cn.taxNote_zh: 稅務居民（在中國有戶籍或每年居住≥183天）須全球申報；無戶籍外國人：中國來源收入+匯入中國的境外所得課稅；2018年起參與CRS自動交換信息

specialPolicies.jp: Visa required (main friction point for Chinese travelers)
specialPolicies.au: Visa required (Electronic Travel Authority not available)
specialPolicies.kr: Visa required (K-ETA not available for PRC)

cn.flightNote: PEK/PVG/CAN as hubs; times from Beijing/Shanghai. PVG–KUL ~5h direct, PVG–NRT ~3.5h, PVG–SYD ~11h, PVG–LHR ~12h direct, PVG–JFK ~14.5h direct (Air China), PVG–ICN ~2.5h, PVG–BKK ~4h. Estimates.

sources.passportRank: Henley Passport Index Q4 2025; Global Times Jul 2025 (China rising from 94th to ~60th since 2015)
sources.tax: PwC China Individual Tax Summary 2025; CRS China participation since 2018
sources.flightHours: Air China / China Eastern / China Southern schedules; Google Flights
sources.specialNote: China-MY mutual visa exemption agreement came into force July 17 2025 (Malay Mail May 2025; China Daily Jul 2025)

my.passportSource: Henley Passport Index Q4 2025 (tied 12th with US; Wikipedia; earlier search confirms 180 destinations)
my.taxNote_en: Territorial — Malaysia-source income taxed; foreign-sourced income received in Malaysia generally exempt until Dec 2036 (exemption extended; must be taxed in source country); no capital gains tax on equities/property for individuals
my.taxNote_zh: 領土制——馬來西亞來源所得課稅；個人外國來源收入匯入馬來西亞至2036年底豁免（須在來源國已課稅）；個人股票/物業無資本利得稅
my.flightNote: KUL as hub. KUL–NRT ~7h, KUL–SYD ~7h, KUL–LHR ~13h direct (MAS), KUL–ICN ~6.5h, KUL–BKK ~2h, KUL–SGN ~2.5h. Estimates.

sources.tax: PwC Malaysia Individual Tax Summary 2025; KPMG Flash Alert MY FSI exemption 2022; EY Malaysia FSI alert
sources.flightHours: Malaysia Airlines / AirAsia schedules; Google Flights

visa.source: PenangMyHome.com MM2H 2025-2026 guide; HudsonMcKenzie MM2H 2025; MelbourneCapitalGroup New MM2H Rules June 2024
visa.notes: Property purchase is required but not counted toward the fixed deposit. Up to 50% of deposit may be withdrawn for approved purposes (property, healthcare, education). USD values are approximate; RM exchange rate ~4.3/USD as of 2026-04.

language.source: EF EPI 2024 (WorldPopulationReview; Numbeo cross-reference); Wikipedia Malaysia demographics

climate.rainySeason: Two monsoon seasons: NE monsoon Nov-Mar (east coast), SW monsoon May-Sep (west coast/KL)
climate.source: Wikipedia avg temp; WorldRiskIndex 2024 (CPBRD Philippines cross-reference; score 14.50 rank 34); World Bank Climate Knowledge Portal

healthcare.universalCoverageNote: Public healthcare exists but not free for foreigners; private hospitals in KL/Penang are high quality and affordable
healthcare.source: Numbeo Healthcare Index 2025 (score 70.3 from Numbeo.com); expat cost estimated based on Pacific Prime / William Russell guides 2025

education.intlSchoolCount_note: estimated; KL has ~80-100+ international schools per ISKL/Tutopiya data
education.source: Tutopiya International School Fees Malaysia 2025-26 guide; ISKL fee schedule 2025-26; QS World University Rankings 2025 (UM #60 — FMT Jun 2025)

safety.source: Numbeo Crime/Safety Index by Country 2025 (Numbeo.com); GPI 2024 (StatisticsTimes.com)

tax.overseasIncomeNote_en: Foreign-sourced income received in Malaysia is exempt until Dec 2036 (condition: must have been taxed in source country); territorial system for individuals
tax.overseasIncomeNote_zh: 個人匯入馬來西亞的境外所得至2036年12月底豁免稅（前提：來源國已課稅）；個人適用領土稅制
tax.source: PwC Malaysia Individual Tax Summary 2025; EY Malaysia FSI Exemption Orders P.U.(A)234/235; KPMG Flash Alert 2022-010; Budget 2026 extension announcement

tiers.name: Investment Visa (MOEA)
tiers.notes: NT$6 million (~USD 190K) minimum investment in Taiwan company; managed by Ministry of Economic Affairs (MOEA)

tiers.name: Employment Gold Card
tiers.notes: For high-income/high-skill professionals; NT$160K/month salary threshold or special talent recognition; work + residency combined

visa.source: MOEA Taiwan investment visa rules; Gold Card portal goldcard.nat.gov.tw; NDC Taiwan
visa.notes: Taiwan does not have a property-linked golden visa akin to MM2H or Golden Visa programs. Property purchase does not grant residency. ARC (Alien Resident Certificate) required for mortgage and long-term stay.

language.efEpiNote: Taiwan not separately ranked in EF EPI 2024 (Chinese territories not included as standalone)
language.englishNote: English literacy improving; younger generations and urban areas more English-capable; daily life and government services primarily in Mandarin
language.source: EF EPI 2024 methodology note; Wikipedia Taiwan demographics; anecdotal expat reports

climate.avgTempNote: Taipei ~22°C annual average; southern Taiwan warmer ~24-26°C
climate.rainySeason: May-Oct (plum rain season May-Jun; typhoon season Jul-Oct); winter mild but rainy in north
climate.worldRiskIndex2024_note: Taiwan not separately listed in WorldRiskIndex 2024 (status as sovereign country not universally recognized in UN data)
climate.source: Climates to Travel Taiwan; Weatherspark Taipei climate; Britannica Taiwan climate; disaster risks per World Bank Climate and academic sources

healthcare.universalCoverageNote: National Health Insurance (NHI) — one of best in Asia; foreigners with ARC/Gold Card eligible after 6 months; cost very low
healthcare.source: Numbeo Healthcare Index 2025 #1 (Numbeo.com); CEOWORLD Healthcare Index 2025 #1 Taiwan; NHI Administration Taiwan

education.intlSchoolCount_note: estimated ~15-25 in Taipei metro area; fewer than MY/JP due to strict regulation
education.source: QS World University Rankings 2026 NTU #63 (TopUniversities.com); ISC Research Taiwan market

tax.overseasIncomeNote_en: Foreign income exempt below NT$1M/household/yr; AMT applies above threshold on worldwide income; CFC rules (individuals) effective Jan 2023 require disclosure of CFC earnings >NT$7M
tax.overseasIncomeNote_zh: 海外所得每戶每年 <NT$100萬豁免；超過門檻適用最低稅負（AMT）計入全球所得；2023年起個人CFC規則，CFC盈餘 >NT$700萬需申報
tax.source: KPMG Taiwan TIES 2026; Grant Thornton Taiwan 2024 Tax Guide; Lexology Taiwan CFC rules 2023; National Taxation Bureau Taiwan

visa.primaryProgram: Business Manager Visa / Highly Skilled Professional (HSP)

tiers.name: Business Manager Visa
tiers.notes: Requires establishing or managing a business with min ¥5M capital OR ¥2.5M investment in existing business; must create 2+ local jobs or maintain physical office

tiers.name: Highly Skilled Professional (HSP) — 70 pts
tiers.notes: Points for education, income, age, research achievements; 70+ pts → PR in 3 years; 80+ pts → PR in 1 year

tiers.name: High-Value Investor PR
tiers.notes: ¥100M+ investment in Japan → PR eligibility after 3 years per Japan Active Investor Visa policy

visa.source: IMI Daily Japan Active Investor Visa; Relocate.World HSP 2025; Bamboo Routes Japan property/visa guide; GOJ Immigration Services Agency
visa.notes: Property purchase in Japan does NOT grant visa or residency. No dedicated property investor visa. Business Manager Visa most relevant for investors operating real estate management company.

language.englishNote: Very low English proficiency outside major tourist areas and international companies; Japanese essential for daily life; improving in Tokyo for 2025 Expo prep
language.source: EF EPI 2024 (WorldPopulationReview; Japan rank 99, score 454, 'low' band)

climate.avgTempNote: Tokyo-representative (national avg includes Hokkaido cold; Tokyo ~15°C / Osaka ~16°C) | prev national avg: 11.8°C
climate.rainySeason: Jun-Jul (tsuyu/plum rain season); autumn typhoon season Sep-Oct
climate.worldRiskIndex2024_note: Japan among top 3 most exposed countries globally per WorldRiskIndex 2024; exact score not found in data extract but qualitative assessment: very high natural disaster exposure
climate.source: Wikipedia avg temp; WorldRiskReport 2024 (Japan top 3 exposed globally per ReliefWeb summary)

healthcare.universalCoverageNote: National Health Insurance covers registered residents including long-term foreign residents; expats pay ~3-5% of income; additional private insurance recommended for full English-language access
healthcare.source: Numbeo Healthcare Index 2025 #3 (Numbeo.com); Japan NHI enrollment rules; expat cost estimated from Morgan Price / Pacific Prime Asia guides

education.intlSchoolCount_note: estimated ~40-60 major English-medium international schools nationally; Tokyo/Yokohama concentration
education.source: ELT School Japan international fees guide 2026; Japan Living Guide tuition; QS World University Rankings 2025 UTokyo #32

tax.personalIncomeTopRateNote: effective combined top: 45% national + 2.1% surtax + ~10% local inhabitant tax ≈ 55%; this field reflects realistic combined
tax.overseasIncomeNote_en: Non-permanent residents (≤5 of last 10 yrs + non-JP national): foreign-source income paid abroad & not remitted to Japan is exempt; remitted amounts taxed; after 5yr threshold = permanent resident → worldwide taxation
tax.overseasIncomeNote_zh: 非永久居住者：境外所得未匯入日本免稅；匯入日本部分課稅；超過5年門檻成為永久居民後全球課稅
tax.overseasAssetReportingNote: Overseas assets >¥50M (~$350K) must be declared on annual return
tax.source: PwC Japan Individual Tax Summary 2025; Japan 2025 Foreigner Tax Changes (AliInJapan); Ushijima & Partners Japan Tax Guide 2025

tiers.name: Investor Stream (188B)
tiers.notes: Must invest min AUD 1.5M in state/territory bonds for 4 years; direct residential property investment NOT permitted

tiers.name: Significant Investor Stream (188C/SIV)
tiers.notes: AUD 5M in complying investments (venture capital, growth private equity, emerging companies, balancing investments); direct residential real estate prohibited

visa.source: DIBP/Home Affairs 188 visa pages; AustraliaMigrate 188C guide; EB5Investors Australian investment immigration
visa.notes: Subclass 188 → Subclass 888 (PR). Foreign buyers of established dwellings banned Apr 2025–Mar 2027. New builds still allowed with FIRB approval. NSW surcharge 9% (from Jan 2025).

language.efEpiNote: English-native country; not included in EF EPI rankings
language.source: ABS Census 2021 — Mandarin spoken at home ~3%; English proficiency by default

climate.avgTempNote: Sydney-representative (Sydney ~18°C / Melbourne ~15°C / Brisbane ~21°C) | prev national avg: 22.1°C
climate.rainySeason: Northern Australia: wet season Nov-Apr; Southern states: winter rain Jun-Aug
climate.worldRiskIndex2024_note: Not extracted from WorldRiskIndex 2024; qualitative: low-moderate risk nationally; wildfire HIGH regionally
climate.source: Wikipedia avg temp; BoM Australia climate; WorldRiskReport 2024 context

healthcare.universalCoverageNote: Medicare for citizens/PR; temporary visa holders not covered by Medicare; must arrange private health insurance; OVHC (Overseas Visitors Health Cover) required for many visa types
healthcare.source: Numbeo Healthcare Index 2025 rank 19 (Numbeo.com); Commonwealth Fund Mirror Mirror 2024 #1 Australia; Services Australia Medicare eligibility

education.intlSchoolCount_note: estimated ~25-40 major English-medium international schools nationally; private schools generally high quality
education.source: QS World University Rankings 2025 Melbourne #13 (Timeout Australia; QS official); ISC Research Australia; typical private school fee ranges

tax.overseasIncomeNote_en: Worldwide taxation for residents; all foreign income declared; foreign income tax offset available; 50% CGT discount for assets held >12 months; no special exemption for overseas income
tax.overseasIncomeNote_zh: 澳洲居民全球課稅；海外所得須申報並可申請外國稅收抵免；持有超12個月資產資本利得打五折
tax.source: PwC Australia Individual Tax Summary 2025; ATO foreign income guide; KPMG TIES Australia Jun 2025

tiers.name: Growth Category
tiers.notes: Higher-risk investments: managed funds, direct NZ business investment; effective from 1 Apr 2025

tiers.name: Balanced Category
tiers.notes: Broader investment range including bonds and property-type; effective from 1 Apr 2025

visa.source: Immigration New Zealand AIP Visa overview; DLA Piper Dec 2025 guide; KPMG Flash Alert 2025-240 NZ AIP Revised; NZTE Invest NZ
visa.notes: General foreign buyer ban on residential property remains in force (Overseas Investment Act). Exception since Dec 2025: AI+/Investor 1&2 visa holders may buy property NZ$5M+. AIP investors gain residency not property purchase rights.

language.efEpiNote: English-native country; not ranked in EF EPI
language.source: Stats NZ 2018 Census; English native speaker country

climate.avgTempNote: Auckland-representative (national avg includes South Island cold; Auckland ~16°C) | prev national avg: 10.5°C
climate.rainySeason: West coast: year-round heavy rain; East coast drier; No extreme monsoon

disasters.typhoon: low (no typhoons; occasional ex-tropical cyclones reach NZ)

climate.worldRiskIndex2024_note: Not found in data; qualitative: earthquake risk high (GeoNet NZ Active Earthquake Zone)
climate.source: Wikipedia avg temp NZ; GeoNet NZ seismic hazard maps; NIWA NZ climate

healthcare.universalCoverageNote: Public healthcare for residents/citizens; temporary visa holders have limited access; ACC covers injury for all; private health insurance recommended
healthcare.source: Numbeo Healthcare Index 2025 rank 34 (Numbeo.com); Health New Zealand Te Whatu Ora eligibility; GPI 2024 NZ rank 4

education.intlSchoolCount_note: very few dedicated international schools; most expat families use private NZ schools which are high quality
education.source: University of Auckland QS 2025 press release; QS World University Rankings 2025; typical private school fees

tax.overseasIncomeNote_en: Worldwide taxation for residents; all foreign income taxed with foreign tax credit; no capital gains tax (except on trading/dealer activity)
tax.overseasIncomeNote_zh: 紐西蘭居民全球課稅；海外所得課稅可抵免外國稅；無一般性資本利得稅（交易商例外）
tax.source: IRD NZ income tax guide; PwC NZ Tax Summary 2025; MoneyHub NZ tax rates 2025

visa.primaryProgram: Innovator Founder Visa / Global Talent Visa

tiers.name: Innovator Founder Visa
tiers.notes: No fixed minimum investment; requires innovative, viable, scalable business plan endorsed by approved body; ILR (PR) after 3 years if business meets criteria

tiers.name: Global Talent Visa
tiers.notes: For recognized leaders/emerging leaders in science, digital technology, arts; ILR after 3yr (leaders) or 5yr (emerging leaders); no investment requirement

closedPrograms: Tier 1 Investor Visa — permanently closed Feb 2022
visa.source: DavidsonMorris UK Investor Visa 2026; immigrationbarrister.co.uk closed routes; gov.uk Innovator Founder Visa
visa.notes: Tier 1 Investor Visa (requiring £2M+ investment) permanently closed Feb 17 2022. No replacement 'golden visa' for passive investors. UK does not plan to reintroduce capital-only investor route.

language.source: ONS 2021 Census; English native speaker country

climate.avgTempNote: London-representative (national avg includes Scotland cold; London ~12°C) | prev national avg: 9.2°C
climate.rainySeason: Year-round rain; Oct-Feb wettest; no distinct monsoon or typhoon season
climate.worldRiskIndex2024_note: UK very low disaster risk; not in top-risk countries on WorldRiskIndex
climate.source: Wikipedia avg temp UK; Met Office climate data; GPI 2024 UK rank 34

healthcare.universalCoverageNote: NHS free at point of use for residents; visa holders pay Immigration Health Surcharge (£1,035/yr per adult from 2024); immediate access to NHS
healthcare.privateQuality: excellent (private Bupa/AXA PPP option widely used)
healthcare.source: Numbeo Healthcare Index 2025 rank 21 (Numbeo.com); NHS gov.uk eligibility; IHS fee gov.uk

education.intlSchoolCount_note: estimated; many international schools particularly in London; many high-quality independent (private) schools
education.topUniName: Imperial College London / University of Oxford / UCL
education.topUniNote: Oxford #3, Imperial #4, UCL #9 in QS 2025; multiple top-10 globally
education.source: QS World University Rankings 2025; ISC Research UK; Cobseo international schools data

tax.personalIncomeTopRateNote: effective top: 45% income tax + 2% NI above £50K cap = ~47% for high earners; this field reflects realistic combined
tax.overseasIncomeNote_en: Worldwide taxation for UK residents; non-dom remittance basis ended Apr 2025; all overseas income now taxable for residents; 4-yr foreign income exemption for new arrivals (FIG regime from Apr 2025)
tax.overseasIncomeNote_zh: 英國居民全球課稅；非定居者匯款基礎已於2025年4月廢除；新移民可享受最多4年境外所得豁免（FIG制度）
tax.source: PwC UK Individual Tax Summary 2025; HMRC non-dom changes Apr 2025; House of Commons Library tax rates 2025/26

tiers.name: EB-5 Targeted Employment Area (TEA)
tiers.notes: Must invest in TEA (rural or high unemployment area); create/preserve 10 full-time jobs; 2yr conditional green card → remove conditions for permanent

tiers.name: EB-5 Standard
tiers.notes: Non-TEA investment; same job creation requirement; USD amounts indexed to inflation, revised 2022

tiers.name: E-2 Treaty Investor (non-immigrant)
tiers.notes: For nationals of treaty countries (TW/JP/KR/UK/CA/AU/IE etc.); does NOT lead to green card; renewable indefinitely; must be 'substantial' investment in US enterprise

visa.source: USCIS EB-5 program; USCIS E-2 visa page; EB5Investors.com 2025 guide
visa.notes: No property-linked visa; EB-5 targets job-creating enterprises, not passive real estate. Foreign buyers face no federal restrictions on property but NYC co-ops may reject via board. FIRPTA withholding on foreign sellers.

official: English (de facto; no federal official language)
language.source: US Census Bureau 2020; ACS language use data

climate.avgTempNote: NYC-representative (national avg distorted by Alaska; NYC ~13°C / LA ~18°C / Miami ~22°C) | prev national avg: 9.5°C
climate.rainySeason: Varies by region; Gulf Coast Jun-Nov hurricane season; tornado alley spring

disasters.typhoon: moderate (hurricane season Jun-Nov along Gulf/Atlantic coasts)

climate.worldRiskIndex2024_note: GPI 2024 US rank 132 (very low peace ranking); NOAA data shows increasing extreme weather events
climate.source: Wikipedia avg temp US; NOAA climate data; GPI 2024

healthcare.universalCoverageNote: No universal coverage; Medicare for 65+/disabled; Medicaid for low-income; employer insurance common; ACA marketplace for individuals; expats need private international health insurance
healthcare.source: Numbeo Healthcare Index 2025 rank 35 (Numbeo.com); Commonwealth Fund Mirror Mirror 2024 US rank last; CEOWORLD US rank ~15; expat cost from William Russell / Cigna global estimates

education.intlSchoolCount_note: 74 in major cities per International Schools Database; actual total higher nationally
education.topUniNote: MIT #1, Harvard #4, Stanford #6, Caltech #10 in QS 2025; dominant globally
education.source: QS World University Rankings 2025; International Schools Database US (74 schools)

safety.politicalStability: moderate (political polarization elevated; local crime varies significantly by city)

tax.personalIncomeTopRateNote: effective combined top: 37% federal + state up to 13.3% (CA/NY high-tax states); FL/TX no state = 37%; this field reflects realistic combined for major property markets (CA/NY)
tax.overseasIncomeNote_en: Worldwide taxation for US citizens and green card holders regardless of residence; FBAR required for foreign accounts >$10K; FATCA Form 8938 for overseas assets >$200K; FEIE excludes up to $130K earned income for citizens living abroad
tax.overseasIncomeNote_zh: 美國公民及綠卡持有人不論居住地均全球課稅；海外帳戶超$10K需申報FBAR（FinCEN 114）；海外資產超$20萬需FATCA 8938；海外居住公民可豁免最高$13萬勞動所得（FEIE）
tax.overseasAssetReportingNote: FATCA 8938: $200K if abroad, $50K if in US; FBAR: $10K aggregate threshold
tax.source: IRS.gov FBAR guide; FATCA Form 8938; FEIE 2025 exclusion amount $130,000; PwC US Tax Summary 2025

visa.primaryProgram: LTR Visa (Long-Term Resident) / Thailand Privilege (Elite) Visa

tiers.name: Thailand Privilege (Elite) — 5yr
tiers.notes: Tourist-based long-stay visa with VIP services; no work authorization; no property ownership requirement; THB 650K (~$18K)

tiers.name: Thailand Privilege (Elite) — 20yr
tiers.notes: THB 2.5M (~$70K) upfront; same tourist-based status

tiers.name: LTR — Wealthy Global Citizen
tiers.notes: USD $1M global assets + $80K annual income + $500K investment in Thailand (govt bonds, property [new construction only], or approved funds); 10yr stay + work permit for 4

visa.source: BOI Thailand LTR visa program; Siam Legal LTR guide 2026; Forbes Partners Elite vs LTR 2025; GlobalCitizenSolutions LTR guide
visa.notes: Thailand does NOT grant residency simply for buying a condo. Condo purchase (49% foreign quota) is separate from visa rights. LTR property investment must be new construction from developer, not secondary market.

language.englishNote: Very low English proficiency; tourist areas (Phuket, Pattaya, Bangkok Sukhumvit) more English-accessible; significant Chinese-Thai community for Mandarin speakers
language.source: EF EPI 2024 (WorldPopulationReview; Thailand rank 131, score 415, 'very low'); Wikipedia Thai demographics

climate.avgTempNote: National average; Bangkok ~28°C; Chiang Mai cooler Nov-Feb ~20°C; south year-round hot
climate.rainySeason: Rainy season: May-Oct; dry season: Nov-Apr; Gulf coast (Koh Samui area): reversed Dec-Jan rain

disasters.typhoon: low (rarely direct landfall; occasional tropical storms)
disasters.flood: high (Bangkok severe flooding 2011; annual flooding central plains)
disasters.wildfire: moderate (northern Thailand dry season burn/haze Mar-Apr)
disasters.haze: high (northern Thailand Mar-Apr from agricultural burning)

climate.worldRiskIndex2024_note: Not found in data; qualitative: flood risk high, haze significant in north
climate.source: Wikipedia avg temp Thailand; TMDS climate data; Bangkok flood history

healthcare.universalCoverageNote: Thai universal coverage scheme covers Thai nationals; foreigners must use private hospitals or purchase insurance; Bumrungrad International (Bangkok) is world-class; costs moderate vs. Western standards
healthcare.privateQuality: high in Bangkok (Bumrungrad, Bangkok Hospital); variable elsewhere
healthcare.source: Numbeo Healthcare Index 2025 rank 8 (Numbeo.com); Asia Lifestyle Magazine expat insurance 2026; Pacific Prime Thailand guide

education.intlSchoolCount_note: estimated; Bangkok alone has ~80-100 international schools; ISC Research identifies Thailand as growing market
education.source: QS World University Rankings 2025 Chulalongkorn #229 (Chula.ac.th; NationThailand); Thailand International School Fees guide 2025 (blog.doris.school)

safety.politicalStability: moderate (history of military coups; current elected government; southern insurgency ongoing)

tax.overseasIncomeNote_en: From 2024: foreign income remitted to Thailand in same tax year as earned is taxable (Revenue Department ruling change); previously only remittances from prior-year income were exempt; significant rule change for tax residents
tax.overseasIncomeNote_zh: 2024年起：泰國稅務居民在同一課稅年度匯入泰國的境外所得須課稅（國稅局裁定改變）；此前只有前年盈餘匯入才免稅，為重大規則變更
tax.source: PwC Thailand Individual Tax Summary 2025; Thailand Revenue Department 2024 ruling; TAINA CRS Thailand compliance

visa.primaryProgram: DT Investor Visa (DT1/DT2) + Temporary Residence Card

tiers.name: DT1 Investor Visa
tiers.notes: For investors contributing >VND 100B (~$4M) or investing in priority sectors/regions; TRC (Temporary Residence Card) up to 10yr validity

tiers.name: DT2 Investor Visa
tiers.notes: VND 50B-100B investment in priority industries; lower threshold than DT1

tiers.name: DT3/DT4
tiers.notes: Lower-tier investor visas for smaller investments

visa.source: DNP Law Vietnam TRC 2025; TanVanLang DT1 guide; FISC.com.vn TRC 2026; Acclime Vietnam TRC guide
visa.notes: Property purchase alone does NOT grant residency. Foreign buyers limited to 50yr renewable leasehold; 30% quota per condo project per Housing Law 2023. DT investor visa is separate and requires business/capital investment.

language.englishNote: Low overall but improving rapidly especially in Ho Chi Minh City and Hanoi; hospitality/real estate sectors more English-capable; daily government services in Vietnamese
language.source: EF EPI 2024 (WorldPopulationReview; Vietnam rank 69, score 498, 'low'); Wikipedia Vietnam demographics

climate.avgTempNote: National average; HCMC ~28°C year-round; Hanoi seasonal ~23°C avg; Da Nang ~25°C
climate.rainySeason: South (HCMC): wet season May-Oct; North (Hanoi): rainy Jun-Sep; Central: Oct-Dec

disasters.typhoon: high (central coast exposed annually; Aug-Nov peak)

climate.worldRiskIndex2024_note: Vietnam not found separately; ASEAN region elevated risk; qualitative: typhoon + flood HIGH for central/north
climate.source: Wikipedia avg temp Vietnam; VNMHA Vietnam climate; UNDP Vietnam disaster risk

healthcare.universalCoverageNote: Public healthcare for Vietnamese nationals; foreigners generally use private international hospitals (FV Hospital, Vinmec, Columbia Asia in HCMC/Hanoi); quality variable; international hospitals good in major cities
healthcare.source: Numbeo Healthcare Index 2025 rank 56 (Numbeo.com); ASEAN Briefing Vietnam healthcare; Pacific Prime Vietnam guide

education.intlSchoolCount_note: 359 per ISC Research/ICEF Monitor 2025 (24% 5-year growth — largest growth in SE Asia)
education.topUniNote: VNU-Hanoi #851-900; VNU-HCMC #801-850 QS 2025; universities improving rapidly
education.source: QS World University Rankings 2025 Vietnam (VNU-Hanoi USSH); ISC Research/ICEF Monitor 2025 Vietnam 359 schools; WhichSchoolAdvisor Vietnam fees guide

safety.politicalStability: stable (one-party state; low crime; petty theft in tourist areas)

tax.overseasIncomeNote_en: Residents (≥183 days/yr) taxed on worldwide income; foreign income from employment taxed progressively up to 35%; flat 20% for non-residents on VN-source income
tax.overseasIncomeNote_zh: 越南居民（每年在越≥183天）全球課稅；就業收入最高35%累進稅率；非居民越南來源所得統一20%稅率
tax.source: PwC Vietnam Individual Tax Summary 2025; ASEAN Briefing Vietnam tax; OECD AEOI Vietnam 2025

visa.primaryProgram: F-2 Investor Resident Visa (IISRE — Real Estate) / F-5 PR

tiers.name: F-2 Public Fund Investment (IISPB)
tiers.notes: Tripled from ₩500M in 2023; invest in designated public fund; maintain 5 years for PR

tiers.name: F-2 Real Estate Investor (IISRE)
tiers.notes: Must purchase qualifying real estate in designated zones: Jeju Island, Incheon FEZ (Songdo/Yeongjong/Cheongna), Alpensia (Pyeongchang), Haeundae (Busan); hold 5 years minimum

visa.source: AllVisaKorea F-2/F-5 guide; CitiNavi South Korea F-2 $400K-800K; GlobalResidenceIndex South Korea; GlobeVisa KR real estate residency
visa.notes: Major restriction: From Aug 21 2025, all foreign buyers in Seoul + most Gyeonggi + 7 Incheon districts must obtain prior government permit and commit to occupancy for 2+ years. IISRE zones (Jeju, specific FEZ) still use older 60-day reporting rule.

language.englishNote: Moderate English proficiency; Gangnam/expat areas Seoul have good English access; daily life largely in Korean; corporate world increasingly English-capable

climate.avgTempNote: National average; Seoul ~12°C; four distinct seasons; hot humid summer, cold dry winter
climate.rainySeason: Changma monsoon: late Jun-Jul; typhoon risk Aug-Sep

disasters.typhoon: moderate (Korean Peninsula occasionally hit; Aug-Sep peak)
disasters.haze: high (yellow dust/fine particulate from China Mar-May)

climate.source: Wikipedia avg temp South Korea; WorldRiskIndex 2024 Korea score 10.59 rank 50 (CPBRD Philippines data)

healthcare.universalCoverageNote: National Health Insurance (NHIS) covers registered foreigners (employed/enrolled); quality very high; out-of-pocket for some services; English-language hospitals available in Seoul
healthcare.source: Numbeo Healthcare Index 2025 rank 2 (Numbeo.com); NHIS Korea enrollment guide; CEOWORLD #2 Korea

education.intlSchoolCount_note: estimated ~40-60; Seoul/Incheon concentration; restricted access (only for foreigners with certain visa statuses in many schools)
education.source: QS World University Rankings 2025 SNU #31 (SNU official press release); ISC Research Korea market

safety.politicalStability: stable domestically; North Korea military tension ongoing

tax.overseasIncomeNote_en: Residents taxed on worldwide income; significant local inhabitant surtax (10% of income tax); top combined rate ~49.5%; foreign tax credit available; CRS participant
tax.overseasIncomeNote_zh: 韓國居民全球課稅；地方所得稅加收10%；最高合計稅率約49.5%；可申請外國稅收抵免
tax.overseasAssetReportingNote: Foreign assets >₩500M (~$365K) must be declared annually
tax.source: PwC Korea Individual Tax Summary 2025; KPMG Korea personal tax guide

visa.primaryProgram: Quebec Immigrant Investor Program / Start-Up Visa (paused Jan 2026)

tiers.name: Quebec Immigrant Investor Program (QIIP)
tiers.notes: Must speak French B2 level; 2yr management experience; invest C$1.2M with Investissement Québec for 5yr (capital returned no interest); must live in Quebec ≥6 months within first 2yr

tiers.name: Start-Up Visa (paused)
tiers.notes: SUV paused for new applicants from Jan 1 2026; applicants with valid letter of support from 2025 have until Jun 30 2026 to apply for PR

visa.foreignBuyerBan: Foreign Buyer Ban extended to Jan 1 2027 (residential property); exceptions for work permit/PR holders
visa.source: Immigration.ca QIIP 2025; Quebec.ca entrepreneur/investor streams; CICNews Jan 2026 SUV paused; Canada.ca foreign buyer ban
visa.notes: Canada Foreign Buyer Ban prevents most non-residents from buying residential property until Jan 2027. Ontario Non-Resident Speculation Tax (NRST): 25%; Toronto additional 10% MNRST = 35% total. BC NRST 20%. QIIP still requires French language (B2).

language.source: Stats Canada 2021 Census; English/French bilingual country

climate.avgTempNote: Toronto-representative (national avg distorted by Arctic; Toronto ~9°C / Vancouver ~11°C) | prev national avg: -4.0°C
climate.rainySeason: Varies widely; Pacific coast rain Oct-Mar; Prairie dry; Ontario/Quebec harsh winters

disasters.flood: moderate (spring snowmelt; Red River, Fraser River)
disasters.wildfire: high (BC wildfires 2023 record; Alberta/BC fire seasons Jun-Aug)
disasters.haze: moderate (wildfire smoke from western fires increasingly reaching east)

climate.worldRiskIndex2024_note: Canada GPI rank 11 (very peaceful); wildfire risk elevated in recent years
climate.source: Wikipedia avg temp Canada; Natural Resources Canada disaster risk; GPI 2024 Canada rank 11

healthcare.universalCoverageNote: Provincial health plans for residents (after 3-month waiting period typically); newcomers/work permit holders covered after qualification; private insurance for dentist/prescriptions; wait times can be long
healthcare.source: Numbeo Healthcare Index 2025 rank 30 (Numbeo.com); Health Canada provincial plan eligibility

education.intlSchoolCount_note: estimated; many excellent private schools; public system also strong
education.source: QS World University Rankings 2025 UofT #25; UToronto.ca QS press release; ISC Research Canada

tax.personalIncomeTopRateNote: effective combined top: 33% federal + provincial 13-25% = ~53.5% in Ontario; AB/BC similar; this field reflects realistic combined
tax.overseasIncomeNote_en: Worldwide taxation for Canadian residents; foreign income declared with foreign tax credit; T1135 reporting for overseas property >CAD$100K; capital gains 50% inclusion rate 2025-2026
tax.overseasIncomeNote_zh: 加拿大居民全球課稅；海外所得申報可抵免外國稅；海外資產超$10萬加元需T1135申報；2025-2026年資本利得計入率50%
tax.overseasAssetReportingNote: T1135 Foreign Income Verification for foreign property >CAD$100K (~USD$73K)
tax.source: PwC Canada Tax Summary 2025; BDO Tax Facts 2025; CRA T1135 form requirements; Wealthsimple Canada tax brackets 2025

visa.primaryProgram: Start-up Entrepreneur Programme (STEP) — IIP closed Feb 2023

tiers.name: Start-up Entrepreneur Programme (STEP)
tiers.notes: Innovative business idea; min €50K funding; must create 10+ jobs and achieve €1M+ sales within 3-4 years; 2yr initial residency → 3yr renewal

visa.source: gov.ie Minister Harris IIP closure announcement; IrishImmigration.ie IIP closure FAQ; CitizensInformation.ie STEP programme; Fragomen Ireland IIP closure
visa.notes: Ireland IIP (golden visa requiring €1M+ investment) permanently closed Feb 2023. No passive investor route. STEP programme requires genuine business creation. No surcharge for foreign property buyers. Stamp duty only: 1% ≤€1M, 2% €1M-€1.5M, 6% >€1.5M.

climate.avgTempNote: National average; Dublin ~10°C; mild maritime climate; often overcast; no extremes
climate.rainySeason: Year-round rain; Oct-Jan wettest; no hurricane/typhoon/earthquake risk
climate.worldRiskIndex2024_note: Ireland GPI rank 2 (2nd most peaceful country globally); very low disaster risk
climate.source: Wikipedia avg temp Ireland; Met Éireann climate data; GPI 2024 Ireland rank 2

healthcare.universalCoverageNote: Public health system (HSE) has long waiting times; many residents use private health insurance (VHI, Laya, Irish Life); Medical Card for low-income; private hospitals widely available and good quality
healthcare.source: Numbeo Healthcare Index 2025 rank 79 (Numbeo.com); HSE Ireland; Deloitte Ireland Budget 2026 health notes

education.intlSchoolCount_note: estimated; small number of dedicated international schools; excellent private secondary schools; strong public school system
education.source: QS World University Rankings 2025 TCD #87 (TCD official press release); ISC Research Ireland market

safety.source: Numbeo Crime/Safety 2025; GPI 2024 (StatisticsTimes; Ireland rank 2 — 2nd most peaceful globally)

tax.personalIncomeTopRateNote: 40% income tax top rate; add USC (Universal Social Charge max 8%) + PRSI (4%) = effective ~52% combined top rate
tax.overseasIncomeNote_en: Worldwide taxation for Irish tax residents; overseas income declared; foreign tax credit available; no remittance basis (unlike UK pre-2025); no capital gains tax exemption for overseas assets
tax.overseasIncomeNote_zh: 愛爾蘭稅務居民全球課稅；海外所得申報可抵免外國稅；無匯款基礎選擇；海外資產資本利得同樣課稅
tax.source: PwC Ireland Individual Tax Summary 2025; Revenue.ie income tax rates; KPMG Ireland Budget 2025 notes; Deloitte Ireland Budget 2026
